titles.text: Tennis no Ouji-sama - Doubles no Ouji-sama - Boys, Be Glorious!
テニスの王子様 ダブルスの王子様 Boys, Be Glorious!

roms.name: Tennis no Ouji-sama - Doubles no Ouji-sama - Boys, Be Glorious! (Japan)

descriptions.text: Tennis no Ouji-sama: Doubles no Ouji-sama - Boys, Be Glorious! is a tennis game made for the Prince of Tennis franchise.

Join the doubles championship with the princes of tennis in Girls be Gracious! Featuring teams from the anime series, choose a partner and play against the others. In the doubles championship, you need to train with your partner, get to know him better and get closer to him.
